metadata.description: APEX Signal Trader Event Taxonomy - 20 core tradeable events (E001-E020)
metadata.note: E021-E040 reserved for future expansion. Goal: expand to ~1000 events.

events.name: EIA Petroleum
events.description: Inventory draw significantly larger than consensus (bullish oil)
events.implementation_notes: Most reliable scheduled event. Hardcode local parser, no Claude.

events.name: EIA Petroleum
events.description: Inventory build significantly larger than consensus (bearish oil)
events.implementation_notes: Symmetric to E001.

events.name: Fed RSS
events.description: Surprise rate cut or strongly dovish language
events.asset_class: MES Long, M6E Long, MGC Long, BTC Long
events.implementation_notes: Highest magnitude event. Local keyword parser for speed.

events.name: Fed RSS
events.description: Surprise rate hike or strongly hawkish language
events.asset_class: MES Short, M6E Short, MGC Short
events.implementation_notes: Symmetric to E003.

events.name: PHMSA
events.description: Major pipeline rupture or explosion affecting supply
events.implementation_notes: Rare but high impact. Classifier needed for language parsing.

events.name: Coast Guard/AIS
events.description: Strait of Hormuz or Suez Canal disruption, closure, or incident
events.implementation_notes: Major geopolitical supply shock.

events.name: EDGAR 8-K
events.description: Surprise M&A announcement for small/mid cap company
events.implementation_notes: Must extract ticker. Alpaca execution.

events.name: EDGAR 8-K
events.description: Going concern notice or major restatement
events.implementation_notes: Must extract ticker. Alpaca execution.

events.name: FDA MedWatch
events.description: Drug approval for specific company
events.implementation_notes: Binary outcome. Very high win rate historically.

events.name: FDA MedWatch
events.description: Drug rejection or safety recall for specific company
events.implementation_notes: Symmetric to E009.

events.name: Whale Alert
events.description: Large BTC transfer TO known exchange wallet (>$50M)
events.implementation_notes: Selling signal. Lower confidence — not all exchange inflows lead to selling.

events.name: Whale Alert
events.description: Large BTC transfer FROM exchange to cold wallet (>$50M)
events.implementation_notes: Accumulation signal. Weak but documented.

events.name: Coinglass
events.description: Price within 0.3% of large long liquidation cluster above
events.implementation_notes: Price magnet mechanics. Cluster acts as target.

events.name: X / Trump account
events.description: Post explicitly positive about crypto or Bitcoin
events.implementation_notes: Documented multiple historical examples of 5-10% BTC moves.

events.name: FAA NOTAM
events.description: Emergency military airspace activation in unexpected region
events.implementation_notes: Weak signal. Requires confirmation from other sources.

events.name: PACER
events.description: Major Chapter 11 bankruptcy filing for public company
events.asset_class: That stock Short, sector ETF Short
events.implementation_notes: High confidence on direction. Must identify sector.

events.name: GDELT
events.description: Conflict escalation score spike in oil-producing region
events.implementation_notes: Weaker signal. Only trade with 2+ source confirmation.

events.name: Reddit velocity
events.description: Ticker mentions spike from <10 to >200 in 5 minutes
events.implementation_notes: Meme momentum. Short duration only. High volatility.

events.name: Stablecoin mint
events.description: USDT or USDC mint event >$500M in single transaction
events.implementation_notes: Weak individual signal. Use as confirmation only.

events.name: Federal Register
events.description: Emergency rule affecting specific sector published
events.implementation_notes: Requires classifier to determine sector and direction.
